title: Massassi Temple (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:RMQ-massassitemple.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Massassi Temple concept art by [[Ralph McQuarrie]].]]

'''Massassi Temple''' can refer to any temple on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] built by the [[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] race, including:
*[[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]]
*[[Temple of Fire]]
*[[Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster/Legends|Temple of the Blueleaf Cluster]]
*[[Palace of the Woolamander]]
*[[Temple of Exar Kun]]
*[[Unidentified Massassi temple]]

{{Disambig}}

|es=Templo massassi
}}
